topWin: Three features shipped in one session — Terms of Service, Complete Your Vault onboarding, Live Activity Feed — plus a simplify pass fixing XSS and eliminating a double round-trip.
topGap: XSS in Activity Feed innerHTML snuck through initial write; esc() should be a default pattern at write time, not caught by simplify review.

improvementGroups.legal: Terms of Service page + footer links on 47 pages
improvementGroups.memberActivation: Complete Your Vault 5-step onboarding checklist in vault portal
improvementGroups.homepageConversion: Live Activity Feed with XSS-safe esc() + merged member count fetch
improvementGroups.codeQuality: Simplify fixes: XSS esc(), headCount double-fetch merged, select('id') cleanup

ignisNote: Shipping three features in one session while simplify caught an XSS mid-flight confirms that inline innerHTML construction needs an in-scope esc() helper as a default pattern — make it a rule at write time, not a remediation step.
